VAL-CROSS-010.evidence: Full GraphQL request/response logs saved in evidence/api-compat/specorch-flow/ (step1-setup-data.txt, step2-daemon-polling.txt, step3-update-state.txt, step4-post-comment.txt, step5-query-comments.txt, step2-blocked-issue-verification.txt)
VAL-CROSS-010.reason: All 5 SpecOrch flow steps completed successfully. Step 1: Created test data (ready issue INV-3 with 'task' label assigned to admin in 'Ready' state, blocked issue INV-16 with 'blocked' label). Step 2: Daemon polling query with compound 'and' filter (team.key.eq=INV, state.name.eq=Ready, assignee.isMe.eq=true, labels.some.name.in=['task'], labels.every.name.nin=['blocked','needs-clarification']) returned exactly the ready issue INV-3 and correctly excluded the blocked issue INV-16. Step 3: Updated picked issue to 'In Progress' state (success=true, state='In Progress'). Step 4: Posted comment 'SpecOrch processing started' (success=true). Step 5: Queried comments and confirmed 'SpecOrch processing started' comment exists with correct user (Admin, admin@involute.local) and valid ISO 8601 createdAt timestamp.

steps.action: Set up test data: get team/states/labels/user IDs, create ready issue with task label + admin assignee in Ready state, create blocked issue with blocked label
steps.expected: Two issues created: one in Ready state with task label assigned to admin, one with blocked label
steps.observed: Both issues created and configured successfully. Ready issue INV-3: state=Ready, labels=[task], assignee=Admin(isMe=true). Blocked issue INV-16: labels=[blocked]

steps.action: Execute daemon polling query with compound filter (team=INV, state=Ready, assignee.isMe=true, labels.some=[task], labels.every.nin=[blocked,needs-clarification])
steps.expected: Returns ready task-labeled issue, excludes blocked issue
steps.observed: Returned exactly 1 issue (INV-3, specorch-ready-task) with state=Ready, labels=[task], assignee.isMe=true. Blocked issue INV-16 was correctly excluded.

steps.action: Update picked issue state to 'In Progress'
steps.observed: success=true, issue state changed to 'In Progress'

steps.expected: success=true, comment created with correct body
steps.observed: success=true, comment id=222349a2-66da-4a4d-882e-fae22cc102fa, body='SpecOrch processing started'

steps.expected: Comment 'SpecOrch processing started' in the comments list
steps.observed: Comment found: body='SpecOrch processing started', user={name:'Admin', email:'admin@involute.local'}, createdAt='2026-04-01T15:27:19.816Z'

summary: Tested 1 assertion (VAL-CROSS-010): PASSED. The complete SpecOrch daemon polling pattern works correctly — complex filter query successfully finds Ready+task-labeled+assigned issues while excluding blocked ones, state update to In Progress succeeds, comment creation succeeds, and comment query confirms the posted comment.
